NAME: CoLaus / PsyCoLaus
DESCRIPTION: Swiss population-based cohort (Lausanne) focused on cardiovascular risk (CoLaus) with parallel PsyCoLaus mental-health deep phenotyping; genotype data used in GWAS and omics analyses.
MANUAL_CITATION: Firmann, M., Mayor, V., Vidal, P. M., Bochud, M., Pécoud, A., Hayoz, D., ... & Waeber, G. (2008). The CoLaus study: a population-based study to investigate the epidemiology and genetic determinants of cardiovascular risk factors and metabolic syndrome. BMC Cardiovascular Disorders, 8(1), 6.
